title: tropaeolum trialatum
intro: Tropaeolum trialatum, also known as Nasturtium, is a flowering annual plant native to South America, characterized by its brightly colored flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin irritations due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tropaeolum trialatum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a useful remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Tropaeolum trialatum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
